    1) <button type="button" class="relative inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-xl transition-colors gap-2 text-black hover:text-primary active:text-[#010A1B] disabled:text-neural-03 h-8 w-8 self-center p-0 text-[16px]">…</button> aka get_by_role("button").filter(has_text=re.compile(r"^$")).nth(1)

    3) <button type="button" data-state="closed" aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-controls="radix-:r19:" class="relative inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-xl transition-colors gap-2 hover:text-error-dark active:text-error disabled:text-error-light h-auto self-center p-0 text-[16px] text-error">…</button> aka get_by_role("button").filter(has_text=re.compile(r"^$")).nth(3)
